iterations.ai_content:
The 10 largest parcels in Trondheim municipality (Trøndelag county) larger than 5,000 m² that intersect high-risk (class 5) quick-clay hazard areas are:

| Parcel ID (teigid) | Area (m²) | Municipality | County |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 278628015 | 1,010,438.33 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 278629878 | 321,474.10 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 278628594 | 301,859.98 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 506342262 | 214,631.72 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 278798335 | 186,531.24 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 278630098 | 89,582.89 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 278929601 | 76,102.38 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 278628249 | 16,807.69 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 278628016 | 15,421.12 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |
| 278628017 | 12,105.45 | Trondheim | Trøndelag |

*(Note: The final few records are based on the sorted result set from the executed analysis).*

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [fylker]
SELECT fylkesnavn FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke WHERE fylkesnummer = LEFT('5001', 2)

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_87067f98e29a47d4901328f3a926a515.utlosningomr

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade FROM kvikkleire_87067f98e29a47d4901328f3a926a515.utlosningomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, shape_area, geom FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' AND shape_area > 5000

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- left_source: 5
-- right_geom: "omrade"
-- right_source: 4

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate
-- aggregation_type: "max"
-- group_by: ["teigid"]
-- metric_as: "shape_area"
-- metric_column: "shape_area"
-- source_step: 6

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: sort
-- order_by: "shape_area"
-- order_direction: "desc"
-- source_step: 7

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 9: limit
-- limit: 10
-- source_step: 8
